name: Premier Bank
description_short: Premier Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank headquartered in Dubuque, Iowa, offering personal and business banking, mortgage services, and investment advisory through LPL Financial partnership.
description_long:
Premier Bank is a locally-rooted community bank that has maintained all its operations in Dubuque, Iowa since its founding. The bank emphasizes its commitment to local community development and positions itself as a relationship-focused alternative to larger national banks. Premier Bank operates with FDIC insurance backing, providing deposit protection up to federal limits.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. For personal customers, this includes checking and savings accounts, auto loans, home equity loans, mortgage financing, and home construction loans. Premier Bank also provides business banking services designed for local enterprises. Beyond traditional banking, Premier Bank partners with LPL Financial to offer Premier Investment Services, featuring retirement planning, college savings vehicles, securities brokerage access, and personalized investment guidance through registered investment consultants.

Premier Bank distinguishes itself through its local-only footprint and community-centric positioning. Rather than competing on national scale, the bank emphasizes deep community ties and local decision-making. The investment services division is staffed by experienced advisors—Brian Ormord (specializing in corporate 401(k) plans and retirement readiness since 1994) and Kyle Lippold—who provide personalized consultations and ongoing education to employers and individuals.

The primary limitation is geographic scope: Premier Bank serves only Dubuque locations, making it inaccessible to consumers outside that area. The website provides limited detail on specific product rates, fees, or minimum balance requirements. For customers seeking investment services, advisory quality depends on engagement with individual consultants rather than standardized service models.
services: Home equity loans and lines of credit
Business banking and local business lending
Securities brokerage and investment advisory (through LPL Financial partnership)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government full faith and credit
All locations concentrated in Dubuque, enabling genuine local decision-making and community accountability
Partnership with LPL Financial provides access to professional securities brokerage and investment advisory services
Experienced investment consultants with 20+ years of retirement planning and 401(k) specialization available for free initial consultations
Comprehensive product range including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, home equity, construction loans, business banking, and investment services
Online account opening and mobile app available for convenient banking access
Brian Ormord holds AIF®, PPC™, and CRPS® certifications, indicating professional credentials in retirement planning
cons: Geographic limitation: operates only in Dubuque, Iowa—unavailable to consumers in other regions
Website provides no transparent rate, fee, or product comparison information for checking, savings, or loan products
Investment services dependent on individual consultant availability (only two listed advisors at JFK location)
Limited online information about minimum balances, APY rates, loan terms, or competitive positioning versus larger banks
No details provided on business banking product features, credit lines, or commercial lending criteria
best_for: Dubuque, Iowa residents seeking relationship-based personal and business banking from a locally-accountable institution
Business owners and employees in the Dubuque area requiring 401(k) administration and retirement planning services
Consumers planning mortgages, home construction, or home equity access with preference for community bank service
diagnosis: Premier Bank is best suited for Dubuque residents and business owners who prioritize community relationship banking and have investment needs. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to Dubuque locations, making the bank inaccessible to consumers outside Iowa.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
